title: Entity
description: An entity is a basic unit of configuration in an IT environment that meets a specific need for an IT service. Entities are usually servers, but can be other IT infrastructure components, such as network devices, storage subsystems, applications, and so on. Entities are optional. The `entity` object contains field aliases and values that identify the entity in KPI searches.

attributes.name: _key
attributes.label: _key
attributes.description: Auto-generated unique identifier for this entity. Can be any unique value.

attributes.name: title
attributes.label: title
attributes.description: Name of the entity. Can be any unique value.

attributes.name: description
attributes.label: description
attributes.description: User defined description of the entity.

attributes.name: identifier
attributes.label: identifier
attributes.description: _values_: Array of alias values that identify the entity _fields_: Array of search fields that identify events for the entity.

attributes.name: informational
attributes.label: informational
attributes.description: _values_: Array of alias values that provide information/description for the entity. _fields_: Array of search fields to extract information/description of the entity.

attributes.name: services
attributes.label: services
attributes.description: Array of sub-objects with _key and title fields of services monitoring this entity via rules configured in services.

attributes.name: sec_grp
attributes.label: sec_grp
attributes.description: The team the object belongs to. The entity object can only belong to default_itsi_security_group (Global team).

attributes.name: sai_entity_key
attributes.label: sai_entity_key
attributes.description: This field exists in ITSI entities that have been merged with SAI entities. It symbolizes the original SAI entities's _key and is used for drilldowns to SAI.

attributes.name: entity_type_ids
attributes.label: entity_type_ids
attributes.description: Array of _key values for each entity type associated with the entity.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
